prompt: I'm starting a new backend service in an empty repo. It'll be a Go API plus a bit of Terraform for its AWS infra (an S3 bucket and a Lambda). Set me up with mise the way our other repos do it — task runner, the usual setup/test/build/lint commands, and the terraform plan/apply flow. Use our conventions.
assertions: go tasks build/test/lint/fmt exist as files
tf tasks init/plan/apply/fmt/check exist as files
every task file follows the contract
no leaked account id / medprev codeartifact domain
